name: Clam Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/4 Pound Sharp Cheddar Cheese, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Use up to 1/2 pound cheese as desired.
In a large saucepan or Dutch oven, sauté onion in melted butter. Add peppers and cook until soft. Add the remaining ingredients, except sherry, and gently cook over low heat until the cheese melts. Stir in the sherry last. This can be prepared up to three to four days in advance. Store covered in containers. To serve, keep warm in a chafing dish surrounded by Melba rounds.
Serves: 20 to 25
Source: "Mountain Measures" --Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
